package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for no_batching_on_handler_driven_db_write_loop: Request handlers that drive row-by-row DB writes with no batch path.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule329NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule329NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule329NegativeRecord) (Rule329NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario329Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule329NegativeService, input Rule329NegativeRecord) (Rule329NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule329NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
